privileged_info_summary: The task involves backfilling synthetic pediatric growth data for a fictional patient, Lucas GRANDJEAN (born 2014-06-15). Four historical growth measurements are provided: Age 1 (10.2 kg, 76 cm), Age 2 (12.5 kg, 87 cm), Age 4 (16.3 kg, 103 cm), and Age 6 (20.5 kg, 115 cm). All measurements align with WHO pediatric growth standards for healthy male children. The data is entirely synthetic, created programmatically by setup_task.sh, and represents realistic but fictional patient data for testing purposes in the MedinTux healthcare application.
